Attackers throw 985 megawatt laser channels into target coordinates.
Defenders are being attacked under siege. Their offensive HP does not count; only their defense HP (498,962 total DEF) is channeled into 482,326 retaliatory counter-firepower.
Attacker casualties: 15 Interceptor, 25 Assault Drone, 3 Disrupter, 10 Matter Extractor, 1 Missile Launcher.
Defender casualties: 16 Interceptor, 76 Assault Drone, 1 Matter Extractor.

newsEvents.title: Galactic Server Active
newsEvents.content: The seasonal space arena is open. Recruit commanders, fortify your moonbases, and seize dominion of the sector!

newsEvents.title: War Declared!
newsEvents.content: The VOID SYNDICATE has officially declared war against the SOLAR EMPIRE! Alliance boundaries are now borders under attack.
